name: Frito Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Corn, Whole Kernel, Canned, Drained (15 oz each)
1 lb Ground Beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Fritos, chili beans, ground beef, tomatoes, corn, and tomato sauce.
2. Add hot sauce if desired.
3. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese over the top of the mixture.
4. Layer this in an oven-safe dish, starting with a layer of Fritos at the bottom.
5. Repeat the layers until the dish is full, ending with another layer of Fritos on top.
6. Cover and microwave for 10 to 15 minutes or until heated through.
7. Remove from the microwave and sprinkle any remaining cheese on top.
8. Serve hot.
